Description: Structure iOS apps with Coordinator pattern for navigation and MVVM for screen logic
Do: Use Coordinators for navigation flows; ViewControllers for UI only; ViewModels for logic
Dont: Use Massive View Controllers; put navigation in ViewControllers; put business logic in Views

Description: Use native URLSession with async/await or Combine for type-safe network requests
Do: Use async/await with URLSession; create typed API client; handle errors with Result type
Dont: Use third-party HTTP libraries unnecessarily; use completion handlers in new code

Guideline: Use Core Data or Realm for Persistence
Description: Choose appropriate local persistence based on complexity and performance needs
Do: Use Core Data with NSPersistentContainer; use predicates for queries; handle migrations; or use Realm for simpler API
Dont: Use UserDefaults for structured data; write custom SQLite wrappers; skip migrations
Code Bad: // Storing objects in UserDefaults\nUserDefaults.standard.set(encodedProducts, forKey: 'products')\n// Not designed for structured data, slow for large datasets

Guideline: Build Programmatic UI with Auto Layout
Description: Create UI in code with Auto Layout constraints for full control and reviewable diffs
Do: Use NSLayoutConstraint or SnapKit; create reusable UI components; avoid Interface Builder for complex UI
Dont: Use fixed frames; mix storyboard and code; skip constraint activation
Code Bad: // Using frames\nimageView.frame = CGRect(x: 0, y: 0, width: 100, height: 100)\n// Doesn't adapt to screen sizes, rotation, or dynamic type

Description: Test with XCTest framework using protocol-based dependency injection for mockability
Do: Define protocols for dependencies; inject via init; use XCTest expectations for async
Dont: Test with real network/database; skip async test expectations; use singletons in tests

Description: Store credentials and tokens in iOS Keychain for hardware-backed encryption
Do: Use Keychain wrapper; set accessibility level; use biometric protection for sensitive items
Dont: Store in UserDefaults; use plaintext files; skip Keychain for tokens
Code Bad: UserDefaults.standard.set(authToken, forKey: 'token')\n// Plaintext, accessible without authentication
